The lords of the Khara drekkana and of the 8th house play an
important role in the despatch of the native. Now let us see the
effects of the 36 decanates becoming the Khara drekkana seve-
rally (1) If it is the first of Aries and is aspected or occupied
by malefics, death is due to water, snake poison and vitiation of
bile. (2) In the second it is due to water, worms, frost or forest.
(3) In the third it is caused by tank, well or precipice. (4) In
the first of Taurus it is due to camels, horse, donkey or elephant,
(5) In the second it is by vitiation of bile, wind, fire or thief.
(6) In the third it is caused by a fall from a vehicle, seat or horse.
H may also be caused by weapons in a fight. (7) In the first
decanate of Gemini it is due to asthma. (8) In the second it
is due to an attack of buffalo, poison or typhoid. (9) In the
last it is due to wild animals, wild elephants, (Snake), or a jungle
horde. (10) In the first of Cancer it is due to crocodile, liquor,
